00030 #ifndef _VM_H_
00031 #define _VM_H_
00032 
00033 /*
00034  * VM system-related definitions.
00035  *
00036  * You'll probably want to add stuff here.
00037  */
00038 
00039 
00040 #include <machine/vm.h>
00041 
00042 /* Fault-type arguments to vm_fault() */
00043 #define VM_FAULT_READ        0    /* A read was attempted */
00044 #define VM_FAULT_WRITE       1    /* A write was attempted */
00045 #define VM_FAULT_READONLY    2    /* A write to a readonly page was attempted*/
00046 
00047 
00048 /* Initialization function */
00049 void vm_bootstrap(void);
00050 
00051 /* Fault handling function called by trap code */
00052 int vm_fault(int faulttype, vaddr_t faultaddress);
00053 
00054 /* Allocate/free kernel heap pages (called by kmalloc/kfree) */
00055 vaddr_t alloc_kpages(int npages);
00056 void free_kpages(vaddr_t addr);
00057 
00058 /* TLB shootdown handling called from interprocessor_interrupt */
00059 void vm_tlbshootdown_all(void);
00060 void vm_tlbshootdown(const struct tlbshootdown *);
00061 
00062 
00063 #endif /* _VM_H_ */
